atRisk.message: A single deposit before {{date}} keeps your streak alive. No rush, any goal or circle deposit counts.

hero.captionEmpty: Make a deposit this {{period}} to light your flame

share.title: Share your streak
share.description: Your card shows your streak count only. Dollar amounts stay private unless you turn them on.

card.oneDepositPer: One deposit per {{period}} keeps your flame lit.
card.changeOncePerYear: Frequency can change once a year.
card.changeOncePerYearNext: Frequency can change once a year. Next change unlocks in {{year}}.

badges.title: Badge collection
badges.progressNone: Keep your streak alive for three months to earn your next badge.
badges.progressToday: Your next badge lands today, keep it going.
badges.empty: Keep a streak alive for three months to earn your first badge. There are four to collect each year, one for every season.

freezes.title: Streak freezes
freezes.description: A freeze automatically protects your streak if you miss a single period. You earn one every three months (up to four a year), and at most one can be used per quarter.

reminders.title: Gentle reminders
reminders.description: A single nudge before a {{period}} closes, only if you want it. Off by default.

vacation.title: Vacation mode
vacation.description: Life happens. Pause your streak once a year (up to 30 days) without losing your progress.

footer.disclaimer: Your streak never affects your balance or your money.

milestone.title: New badge earned
milestone.description: Three months of steady saving. That consistency is the whole game. Nicely done.

profile.title: Streak frequency
profile.description: Choose how often a deposit needs to happen to keep your savings streak alive.
profile.frequencyError: Could not change your streak frequency.
profile.lockNote: You can change your streak frequency once per calendar year.
profile.lockNoteNext: You can change your streak frequency once per calendar year. Your next change unlocks in {{year}}.

daily.label: Daily
daily.description: Keep the flame alive with a deposit every day. Best for an everyday saving habit.

weekly.label: Weekly
weekly.description: One deposit any time during the week keeps your streak going. A calm, steady pace.

monthly.label: Monthly
monthly.description: A single deposit each calendar month is all it takes. Gentle and low-pressure.
